exchanges.prompt: Design a multi-cloud architecture using AWS S3 for storage, Azure Functions for compute, and GCP BigQuery for analytics with a Kubernetes orchestration layer

response.content:
architecture-beta
    group frontend(cloud)[Frontend]
    group compute(server)[Compute]
    group storage(disk)[Storage]
    group analytics(chart)[Analytics]
    group orchestration(gear)[Orchestration]
    group monitoring(cloud)[Monitoring]

    service ingress(logos:nginx)[Ingress] in frontend
    service azurefunc(logos:azure)[Azure Functions] in compute
    service k8s(logos:kubernetes)[Kubernetes] in orchestration
    service s3(logos:aws-s3)[S3 Bucket] in storage
    service bigquery(logos:google-cloud)[BigQuery] in analytics
    service cw(logos:aws-cloudwatch)[CloudWatch] in monitoring
    service redis(logos:redis)[Redis Cache] in storage
    service postgres(logos:postgresql)[Postgres DB] in storage

    ingress:R -- L:azurefunc
    azurefunc:R -- L:k8s
    k8s:R -- L:s3
    k8s:R -- L:bigquery
    s3:R -- L:redis
    s3:R -- L:postgres
    azurefunc:B -- T:cw
    k8s:B -- T:cw
    bigquery:B -- T:cw
    redis:B -- T:cw
    postgres:B -- T:cw
